response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00 - 01:10: Performed 'High-Touch! Memory' (identified on screen). 2. 01:10 - 04:55: Talk segment where the performer presents new outfits and stage art. 3. 04:55 - End: Performed a short snippet of 'Menishuki Rashussu!' (identified via lyrics). 4. Searched for lyrics for both songs using original Japanese titles and artist/composer names as specified.
response.global_summary: This video showcases Oozora Subaru in her 7th Anniversary Live, performing 'High-Touch! Memory' (ハイタッチ☆メモリー), followed by a talking segment where she presents her new outfit and pixel art stage assets. The video ends with a brief performance snippet of 'Menishuki Rashussu!' (めにしゅき♡ラッシュっしゅ!).

scenes.description: Oozora Subaru performs the song 'High-Touch! Memory' on a colorful stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: いっせーので 君とだけ！もう少し眠りたいけど もったいないよ 今日はSunday楽しいこと やりたいこと Wake up！ 始めようよめくりめく季節 君と 次のステージへ声を合わせ 扉開けて 駆け出せ迷わずに転んでも かっこわるくてもイイじゃないStand up！ イメージ もっと 重ねて行くその先でいっせーので 君とだけ！ハイタッチ 手たたいて 奏でるメロディーを合図に走り出せ Go！ 君とならこわくないハイタッチ 手と手叩いて 重ねるそのメモリーは明日へのエネルギー Yeah！ さあ行こうよもっと先へ君となら Happy Lucky Life！(ハピラキラ)あの日見た夢の続き 追いつくその日まで涙なんて振り切るくらい もっとスピードアップどんな未来になっても 後悔しないよ自分自身 選んだ道 踏み出せ迷わずに落ち込んで 進めなくなった時はWake up！ 思い返す 夢見た頃の記憶を手と手で 奏でる 叶える 煌めく 夢を 君とだけ！ハイタッチ その度に 繋がっていく心一人じゃないことを そう 気付かせてくれたよねハイタッチ 手と手叩いて 奏でるそのメロディーが世界に届くまで Yeah！ この夢は続いてく君となら Happy Lucky Live！(ハピラキラ)くじいて歩けない日は おんぶしてあげる君をほら見てそっちの方が 強く地面 踏み込める巡り巡る日々を 辿り夢見たステージへ届くその日を見つめて 起こそう君とだけ！手と手を鳴らす度 小さなビッグバン無限のそのチカラを受けて進め！ハイタッチ 手たたいて 奏でるメロディーを合図に走り出せ Go！ 君とならこわくないハイタッチ 手と手叩いて 重ねるそのメモリーは明日へのエネルギー Yeah！ さあ行こうよもっと先へ君となら Happy Lucky Life！(ハピラキラ)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: One, two! With just you! I want to sleep a little longer, but it's a waste, today is Sunday. Fun things, things I want to do, wake up! Let's get started, in this rotating season, with you, to the next stage. Combine our voices, open the door, run out without hesitation. Even if you fall, even if it looks uncool, it's fine, stand up! Increase the image even more, and beyond that, one, two! With just you! High-touch, clap hands, the melody we play, use it as a signal and run out, go! I'm not afraid if I'm with you. High-touch, clap hands and hands, the memory we stack is energy for tomorrow, yeah! Let's go, even further ahead, with you, happy lucky life! (Hapi-Raki-Ra). Until the day we catch up to the sequel of the dream we saw that day, fast enough to shake off tears, speed up even more. No matter what kind of future it becomes, I won't regret it, the path I chose myself, step out without hesitation. When you're feeling down and can't move forward, wake up! Remember the memories of the time we dreamed, play with hand and hand, fulfill it, the sparkling dream, with just you! High-touch, every time, the heart that connects, you let me notice that I'm not alone, yeah! High-touch, clap hands and hands, the melody we play, until it reaches the world, yeah! This dream will continue, with you, happy lucky live! (Hapi-Raki-Ra). On days when you are crushed and can't walk, I'll give you a piggyback, if you look, that way you can step harder on the ground. The revolving days, follow them to the stage we dreamed of, watch the day it reaches, let's cause it with just you! Every time we clap hands, a small big bang, receive the power of the infinite and move forward! High-touch, clap hands, the melody we play, use it as a signal and run out, go! I'm not afraid if I'm with you. High-touch, clap hands and hands, the memory we stack is energy for tomorrow, yeah! Let's go, even further ahead, with you, happy lucky life! (Hapi-Raki-Ra).
